name: detector contract: --rule-state-override bypasses canary state for testing (§2.2 + O-7)
command: OUT=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/no-any.sh" --json --rule-state-override block --paths "src/**/*.ts"); echo "$OUT" | grep -q '"rule_state":"block"' && echo ok >&2
setup: mkdir -p src && echo "const x: any = 1;" > src/a.ts
